info.description: Backend API for Work Hub — dashboard, DB manager, finances (PEN), and couple modules.
info.title: Work Hub API

post.description: Requires an active login session (cookie), not another API key — you can't mint a key using a key. The "key" field is shown only once and cannot be retrieved again.
Public endpoint. Validates email/password and sets access_token/refresh_token cookies.
Public endpoint (relies on the refresh_token cookie, not JWT auth). Atomically claims and rotates the refresh token.
Public endpoint. Registration closes after 2 accounts exist; role is server-assigned (first=admin, second=guest).

get.description: Only mounted when CLI_TOKEN is set. Intended for the workhubctl CLI tool.

get.summary: List contributions to a savings goal

get.description: All-time balance, selected month income/expense, a 6-month trend, and expense breakdown by category.

post.description: Downloads and converts a YouTube URL to MP3, streaming the file back. youtube.com/youtu.be hosts only.
post.summary: Download a YouTube video as MP3

post.description: Same as Download but gated by a shared-secret token instead of JWT login — for sharing with someone without an account. Token travels as ?token= or an Authorization: Bearer header. Only mounted when YTDLP_PUBLIC_TOKEN is set.
post.summary: Download a YouTube video as MP3 (public, token-gated)

parameters.description: Shared-secret token (alternative to the Authorization header)
parameters.name: token

BearerAuth.description: Static token used by CLI and public share routes, sent as "Bearer <token>".
BearerAuth.name: Authorization

CookieAuth.description: JWT access token issued by /api/auth/login, sent as the access_token cookie (not an Authorization header — see middleware.JWTAuth).
CookieAuth.name: access_token
